# CropperJS 1.5.13

Vendored from:

- `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cropperjs@1.5.13/dist/cropper.min.js`
- `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cropperjs@1.5.13/dist/cropper.min.css`

The expected SHA-384 hashes are recorded as Subresource Integrity attributes
in `public/admin/index.html` and verified by `test-scripts/security-tests.js`.

CropperJS is distributed under the MIT licence:
`https://github.com/fengyuanchen/cropperjs/blob/v1.5.13/LICENSE`.
